dfrobot_asr_init.message0:
Initialize the speech recognition module
Recognition pattern %1
Microphone mode %2
I2C address %3
Use %4
dfrobot_asr_init.tooltip: Initialize DFRobot speech recognition module, supporting three recognition modes

dfrobot_asr_add_command.tooltip: Add a phonetic entry. The entry uses pinyin (such as: kai deng), and the identification number range is 1-255.

dfrobot_asr_read.message0: Read the speech recognition result number
dfrobot_asr_read.tooltip: Read the recognized entry number and return -1 to indicate that it has not been recognized.

dfrobot_asr_set_i2c_addr.message0: Set the voice module I2C address %1
dfrobot_asr_set_i2c_addr.tooltip: Set the I2C address of the voice module (0-127), which will take effect after powering on again.
